checks.description: Post‑reset outputs must resolve to a defined, non‑X/Z state within a few cycles after reset release.
checks.pass_condition: Hours, Mins, and Secs are either 0 or any valid value (0‑23 for Hours, 0‑59 for Mins/Secs) and contain no X or Z bits within the observation window.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset deasserts (RST goes low) after being asserted.

checks.description: Seconds counter increments by one each clock cycle and wraps from 59 to 0.
checks.pass_condition: If Secs != 59 then Secs_next == Secs + 1; if Secs == 59 then Secs_next == 0.
checks.trigger_condition: On each rising edge of CLK when reset is not asserted.

checks.description: Minutes counter increments when seconds wrap from 59 to 0 and wraps from 59 to 0 after reaching 59 minutes.
checks.pass_condition: If Secs transitions 59→0 then Mins_next == (Mins == 59 ? 0 : Mins + 1); otherwise Mins_next == Mins.
checks.trigger_condition: On each rising edge of CLK when reset is not asserted.

checks.description: Hours counter increments when minutes and seconds both wrap from 59 to 0 and wraps from 23 to 0 after reaching 23 hours.
checks.pass_condition: If Mins and Secs transition 59→0 simultaneously then Hours_next == (Hours == 23 ? 0 : Hours + 1); otherwise Hours_next == Hours.
checks.trigger_condition: On each rising edge of CLK when reset is not asserted.
